title: hibbertia notabilis
intro: Hibbertia notabilis, also known as the Guinea flower, is a flowering plant species native to eastern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and psoriasis due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hibbertia notabilis include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Hibbertia notabilis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, creams, and ointments, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
